title: calappa procopiana
side_effects: Calappa procopiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting, which may be caused by an allergic reaction or an overdose of its extracts. Some individuals may also experience skin irritation, itching, or rashes due to the plant's sap, which can be toxic if not handled carefully. In severe cases, improper use of Calappa procopiana may lead to more serious health complications, including kidney or liver damage, or even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
